plan.name: Spring 2027
plan.notes: Replay of the 2026 MASTER LIST, walked crop-by-crop in earliest-plant-date order. Weeks shifted +1yr (26xx->27xx, 25xx->26xx). House capacity is fixed (zero-sum per house); round 1 (pansies/cool, plant <~wk13) flips to round 2 (warm, wk13+).

default_soil_mix.name: BM5 Compressed - Peat, Perlite, Woodfiber
default_soil_mix.note: Everything is grown in this one mix. Bales needed = total fill cu ft / 3.8; soil cost = bales * 21.06.

field_log: default_soil_mix added (BM5 Compressed, 3.8 cf bale, $21.06) — single mix for all crops.

pot_volumes_cuft added — loose-fill cu ft per master-list pot code. 1801 verified at 0.47; all others are estimates to verify (especially MARKET, POT 6, and the HB/bowl/fiber pots). Soil per line = pots_to_fill * pot_volumes_cuft[pot_size].

pot_components added — some pots are multi-part assemblies (flat + insert, etc.). 1801R = TV1020P18 retail flat ($0.76) + TPS1801 retail insert ($0.53) = $1.29/unit; soil goes in the insert only. Materials roll-up orders each component per unit.

MARKET = HC Dillen Jr Market Basket, FILLED WITH SOIL AND PLANTED DIRECTLY (8 plugs straight into the basket — Caleb confirms no separate pots). Soil/unit = basket fill ~0.21 cf (6.34 qt). Basket in containers (sku MPB08350A103050, has_carrier=false). Need basket + handle cost.

1801L = East Jordan TF-1801 Market Tray (sku TF1801MT-STD-BLK), single 18-cell flat, 457 cu in dry fill = 0.264 cf (corrected from a bad 0.47 library estimate). Updated the existing '1801 Landscape Tray' record. 1801R fill = 0.264 too — Caleb confirms the TPS1801 retail insert is the same as the landscape tray.
8COLOR = 9 Hanging Basket Patio Pot (sku SHB 900, East Jordan Shuttle 9in HB, 348 cu in = 0.201 cf, $0.4541) — = the fall '8in annual'. Container fill updated.

PANSIES APPLIED to Supabase 2026-06-09: created 'Spring 2027' production_plan; inserted 69 pansy scheduled_crops at wk 51/2026 (5,785 units) from the 2026 master list; +38 pansy varieties in variety_library (now 52); soil_mix=BM5 Compressed; all pots mapped. Applied directly from CSV (items[] left empty). Bench map: only 28/69 rows mapped — MISSING benches: Quonset 03 (EQ0301-0304), Quonset 07 (EQ0703), EQH0501-0510. Re-runnable via /tmp/apply_pansy.sql (deletes prior 'Spring 2027 pansy replay%' rows first).

pot_components._note: 1801R = retail: 1 flat + 1 insert ($1.29 total), soil in the insert (~0.264 cf). 1801L = landscape: a single East Jordan TF1801MT tray ($0.65), soil in its 18 cells (0.264 cf).
